ignitium_set.title: Complete the Ignitium armor set — all four pieces for full set bonus (fire immunity passive)

subtitle.text: Ignis drops Ignitium. The Monstrosity drops Lacrima. Both materials. Both gates. One chapter.

description: CH.11 · IGNITIUM AND LACRIMA
▸ Ch11 drops two critical materials.
Ignitium from Ignis: the fire armor set.
Lacrima from the Netherite Monstrosity: the age trigger.
Both have separate uses.
Both require different bosses.
Farm them in the correct order.
◈ IGNITIUM ARMOR SET
└ cataclysm:ignitium — material from Ignis fight
└ Full set: Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots
└ Set bonus (full 4 pieces): Fire Immunity passive
No fire damage from any source while wearing all four
└ Additional: strong Cataclysm-tier protection
└ Upgrade path: Ignitium → Emulator gear (final tier)
◈ IGNITIUM WEAPON
└ Ignitium Sword: applies Ignite on hit
└ Ignite: fire DOT that bypasses fire resistance
(Ignitium armor does NOT protect against its own sword)
└ Best against: non-fire enemies in Ch12+
└ Check JEI for all Ignitium crafting recipes
◈ LACRIMA — INFERNAL AGE TRIGGER
└ cataclysm:lacrima — drops from Netherite Monstrosity
└ Obtaining Lacrima triggers the Infernal Age (Ch12)
└ DO NOT farm Monstrosity until you are ready for Ch12
Lacrima triggers the age transition automatically
└ If you are still mid-Ch11 progression: skip Monstrosity
└ Lacrima is also a crafting ingredient for Ch12 recipes
◈ FARMING ORDER
└ Step 1: Kill Ignis (get Ignitium) → craft full set
└ Step 2: Kill Annihilator (get Annihilator drops)
└ Step 3: Fight Emulator in full Ignitium set
└ Step 4: WHEN READY for Ch12 → kill Monstrosity
(Lacrima = Ch12 gate trigger)
▸ Ignitium was the fire that refused to burn out.
Lacrima was the tear the Nether shed
when something it valued was lost.
The Monstrosity was the Nether trying to get it back.
You are the reason it couldn't.
▶ Complete the Ignitium armor set [check]
▶ Obtain Lacrima (when ready for Ch12)
◇ Lacrima is the Ch12 gate — obtain LAST in Ch11.
Clear all Cataclysm fights, build Emulator gear,
then kill the Monstrosity as your Ch12 entry ticket.
